source_name: Code4rena Wise Lending Findings & Analysis Report (2024-02)
finding_title: Liquidators can pay less than required to completely liquidate private collateral balance
summary: Wise Lending 的 liquidation receive amount 计算在处理 uncollateralized/private collateral 时先消费了普通余额，过晚检查 uncollateralized 标志，使 liquidator 可以少付 shares 却拿走更多 collateral，增加坏账。
root_cause: liquidation payout calculation mixes private/uncollateralized collateral with normal balance before enforcing the uncollateralized-position restriction
broken_invariants: liquidation payout must be bounded by the debt shares actually repaid
private or uncollateralized balances must not be seized using pricing paths intended for normal collateral
attack_preconditions: 存在 liquidation path 可选择 receive token 或 private collateral balance
目标 position 已处于可清算或 uncollateralized 状态
attacker_capability: liquidator able to choose liquidation tokens and amount

impact.description: liquidator steals user collateral and leaves/increases protocol bad debt

why_not_higher: 保留 final report High；需要当前代码中存在同类 private/uncollateralized collateral separation。
why_not_lower: 影响是清算路径下的直接 collateral over-seizure 与坏账增加。
common_false_positive_angles: 如果所有 collateral balance 在清算前已统一按同一权重/风险参数重算，则不适用
如果 liquidator 不能选择 receive token 或不能触达 private collateral，则降级
mitigations: 在计算 receive amount 之前先拒绝或隔离 uncollateralized/private collateral；不要在普通 collateral payout 中混用该余额。
trigger_actions: liquidate a vulnerable position while specifying receive token tied to private/uncollateralized balance
pay fewer debt shares than the seized collateral value requires
